summary: Phase 1 Zigbee pairing/broker/CRUD backend and mobile UI fully verified. 14/14 pytest tests pass in ~14s including the 12s permit_join watchdog expiry check. Frontend Zigbee screen at 390x844 renders correctly with no horizontal scroll: permit-join button, 60s countdown badge (observed 59s tick), stop button, broker-test toast (mentions MQTT_BROKER), 8 remove buttons, 8 edit-name inputs, 44 role chips all interactive with correct testIDs. Simulator mode behavior handled properly (broker_connected=false, mqtt_source='simulator', simulated=true in permit-join response). All regressions (dashboard summary, system wifi, push/test) still pass.

issues: Pairing card title 'Ajouter une nouvelle sonde' wraps to 4 narrow lines because flex row shares width with the big 'Rechercher une sonde' button (see screenshot). Consider stacking vertically at <420px width or reducing button padding. Non-blocking, cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings in browser console: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Not blocking on RN native but should migrate in a future iteration. Reference: various components using shadowColor/shadowOffset.

action_items: (Optional cosmetic) Make ZigbeeScreen pairing card stack vertically on narrow phones (<420px) so the 'Ajouter une nouvelle sonde' title doesn't wrap to 4 lines.
(Tech debt) Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and props.pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents to silence RN Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2097 lines — should be split into modules (zigbee, mqtt, maintenance, push, equipment) per the >700 line guideline.
In zigbee_status endpoint the raw zigbee_bridge_state dict is spread into the response; this is fine but consider a Pydantic model for stronger contract.
seed_data_creation: One demo Zigbee device was deleted by the test_delete_device_and_404_on_missing test (last device in list). init_db reseeds only if the zigbee_devices table is empty; the remaining 8 demo devices are still present and the deleted device will NOT be re-added until the DB is wiped. Not blocking — device count on the app is now 8/9.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zigbee endpoints run in simulator mode (MQTT_BROKER unset). Permit-join watchdog expires state after the requested duration (verified with duration=10). Frontend polls /api/zigbee/{devices,status} every 3s while on screen. testIDs available on Zigbee screen: zigbee-screen, zigbee-permit-join, zigbee-permit-stop, zigbee-broker-test, zigbee-remove-{id}, zigbee-edit-name-{id}, zigbee-name-input-{id}, zigbee-name-save-{id}, zigbee-role-{id}-{role}. Test file test_zigbee_pairing.py deletes one device — expect device_count=8 after running the suite once (unchanged on re-runs since deletion of a non-existent device just returns 404).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All acceptance criteria met.
